contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: USD Treasury Balance: dedicated /treasury page, formula-matched breakdown
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/131
  
  Details:
  Operator-surfaced bug: truesight.me showed USD Treasury Balance = 15,619.03 (top) but the inline 'View ledger breakdown' summed to 19,479.02 — a 3,860 USD gap. Two completely different formulas, same label.
  
  Root cause traced across two repos:
  - Top-line: GAS function updateUSD_TREASURY_BALANCE() in tokenomics/google_app_scripts/tdg_asset_management/tdg_wix_dashboard.gs. Formula = off-chain assets + USDT vault + sum of TrueSight DAO equity holdings in each AGL. DAO-owned only.
  - Breakdown: client-side render reading treasury-cache/dao_offchain_treasury.json, summing items[].ledgers[<id>] for every USD line across every managed ledger — gross USD INCLUDING AGL investors' capital that isn't owned by the DAO. AUM-shape data labeled as Treasury.
  
  Plus two ancillary UX problems Gary surfaced in the same session:
  - Card alignment: opening one card's <details> stretched the entire grid row, pulling sibling cards' bottom buttons out of horizontal alignment
  - Squished tables: per-line breakdown rendered inside a ~280px stat card body, hard to read on mobile
  
  Shipped: collapse all three into one move.
  
  1. tokenomics#298 (merged 19ca987, deployed to live web service @7):
     - New helpers getLedgerUrlsWithIdsFromWix() + getTrueSightDAOEquityHoldingsWithIds(ledgers) that preserve ledger_id so per-AGL split is renderable
     - New computeTreasuryBreakdown() returning structured JSON: off_chain_assets_usd, usdt_vault_usd, agl_equity{total_usd, per_ledger[]}, total_usd, formula, note
     - New doGet ?type=treasury_breakdown branch — existing performance-stats default endpoint untouched
     - Existing getLedgerUrlsFromWix() / getTrueSightDAOEquityHoldings() unchanged (callers depend on URL-array / scalar-array shapes)
  
  2. truesight_me_beta#131 (merged ac83700, cherry-picked to prod 52fa74e):
     - New /treasury/index.html — three sections (Off-chain · USDT vault · DAO equity in AGLs with per-ledger split), formula box, methodology footer explaining 'DAO-owned' vs 'AUM'
     - Landing card: inline <details class='stat-breakdown'> replaced with 'View breakdown →' link to /treasury (same visual chrome so no layout shift)
     - .stats-grid { align-items: start } — each card sizes to its own content; expanding the still-inline AUM breakdown no longer drags sibling cards' baselines around
  
  Live verification (GAS endpoint pre-PR):
    total_usd:   15619.03   ← now matches USD_TREASURY_BALANCE exactly
    off_chain:   14442.61
    usdt_vault:      0.00
    agl_equity:   1176.42 (AGL14 456.49, AGL8 268.06, AGL7 242.86, AGL10 193.91, AGL6 15.10, AGL2 ~0)
  
  CNAME-safe promotion: cherry-picked 52fa74e onto prod main, NOT 'gh repo sync --force' (per the 2026-05-19 incident memory). Verified post-push: prod CNAME still 'truesight.me'.
  
  Follow-ups parked: AUM card gets its own /aum page mirroring the same shape; add /treasury to llms.txt.
  
  PRs:
  - TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#298 (squash 19ca987; GAS deploy @7)
  - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#131 (squash ac83700; prod cherry-pick 52fa74e)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
